first_tick_commands: execute unless entity @s[tag=EOP.Moon.Form] run tag @s add EOP.Sun.Form

Astral.Energy.Manipulation.title: Astral Energy Manipulation
Astral.Energy.Manipulation.description: You have obtained the power to absorb astral energy and manipulate it

Secondary.Ability.title: Starflare
Secondary.Ability.description: Fire an astral bolt that damages enemies in its path. §dBattlemode §fmust be enabled via keybind. §dRight Click §fto use this ability

Astral.Shift.Unlock.title: Astral Shift
Astral.Shift.Unlock.description: Shift between Solar and Lunar states, altering your abilities and passive bonuses

Astral.Shift.title: Astral Shift
first_tick_commands: execute unless predicate eop:is_sneaking run execute unless entity @s[tag=EOP.Sun.Form] run playsound eop:energy_blast master @a ~ ~ ~ 1 2
execute unless predicate eop:is_sneaking run execute unless entity @s[tag=EOP.Sun.Form] run particle eop:light_energy ~ ~1 ~ 0.3 0.3 0.3 0.25 40
execute unless predicate eop:is_sneaking run tag @s add EOP.Sun.Form
execute unless predicate eop:is_sneaking run tag @s remove EOP.Moon.Form
execute if predicate eop:is_sneaking run execute unless entity @s[tag=EOP.Moon.Form] run playsound eop:energy_blast master @a ~ ~ ~ 1 1
execute if predicate eop:is_sneaking run execute unless entity @s[tag=EOP.Moon.Form] run particle eop:dark_energy ~ ~1 ~ 0.3 0.3 0.3 0.25 40
execute if predicate eop:is_sneaking run tag @s add EOP.Moon.Form
execute if predicate eop:is_sneaking run tag @s remove EOP.Sun.Form

Celestial.Drift.Unlock.title: Celestial Drift
Celestial.Drift.Unlock.description: Dash through space in a chosen direction

commands: execute if entity @s[tag=EOP.Sun.Form] run particle eop:light_energy ~ ~1 ~ 0 0 0 0.1 10
execute if entity @s[tag=EOP.Moon.Form] run particle eop:dark_energy ~ ~1 ~ 0 0 0 0.1 10

Energetic.Surge.Unlock.title: Energetic Surge
Energetic.Surge.Unlock.description: Releave a wave of astral energy around yourself

Gravitic.Collapse.Unlock.title: Gravitic Collapse
Gravitic.Collapse.Unlock.description: Create a gravity well that pulls enemies toward its center

Eclipse.Ascension.Unlock.title: Eclipse Ascension
Eclipse.Ascension.Unlock.description: Ascend into a celestial being, gaining flight, unlimited Astral Energy, and enhanced abilities
